message:
✨ Persist tile mode, checked tiles, and active tab across restarts (#109)

Save UI state to localStorage so the app reopens with:
- The same active tab (Sessions vs Bidirectional)
- Tile mode on/off state preserved
- Previously checked tiles re-checked by tmux session name

State is saved on every change and restored when tabs are created
(mount restore, addTab, attachTab, and auto-discover).

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
